recommendations.title: Hamlet
recommendations.overview: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, returns home to find his father murdered and his mother now marrying the murderer... his uncle. Meanwhile, war is brewing.

recommendations.title: Of Human Bondage
recommendations.overview: A young man finds himself attracted to a cold and unfeeling waitress who may ultimately destroy them both.

recommendations.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
recommendations.overview: In the years before World War II, a penniless Japanese child is torn from her family to work as a maid in a geisha house.
